zh.Osmaston, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾奧斯馬斯頓
zh.Derby, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Franceis II於1170年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Robert de Franceis I18歲，母親Isabella de Bretton17歲。他於1194年與Mabel de Luttchurch在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1210年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比享年40歲。

zh-hans.Osmaston, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾奧斯馬斯頓
zh-hans.Derby, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾德比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Franceis II于1170年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，他的父亲Robert de Franceis I18岁，母亲Isabella de Bretton17岁。他于1194年与Mabel de Luttchurch在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1210年在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Franceis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Francis  .

variants.name: Francis
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Franceis II was born in 1170, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Franceis I, was 18 and his mother, Isabella de Bretton, was 17. He married Mabel de Luttchurch in 1194, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1210, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Franceis II est né en 1170, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Franceis I, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Bretton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Mabel de Luttchurch en 1194, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1210, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Franceis II 1170 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Franceis I 18 und seine Mutter Isabella de Bretton 17. Er hat 1194 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Mabel de Luttchurch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Franceis II è nato il nel 1170 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Franceis I, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Bretton, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Mabel de Luttchurch nel 1194, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1210, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Franceis IIが1170年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Franceis Iは18歳，母Isabella de Brettonは17歳であった。1194年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでMabel de Luttchurchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1210年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Franceis II(이)가 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Franceis I(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Bretton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Mabel de Luttchurch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Franceis II nasceu em 1170, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Franceis I, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Bretton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel de Luttchurch em 1194, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1210, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Franceis II родился в 1170 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Franceis I было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Bretton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel de Luttchurch в 1194 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1210 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Franceis II nació en 1170, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Franceis I, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Isabella de Bretton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Mabel de Luttchurch en 1194, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1210, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
